Whats LC

Artistic web design for creative businesses.

house analogy..../ start with basic, scale up as your business grows. Why should you prefer a custom-made website, when you can simply use wix or wordpress? Because a custom website fits your business, personality, goals... and you alone.

whats included

This is where the relatable problem goes.

What happens if you (potential client) doesn't take action to solve their problem. ex: what happens to client business if they decide not to try LC.

Gives client a game plan.

positive outcome of working w LC. ex: what happens to client business if they DO try LC.

Services Included

I build a recognizable style systems, not just templates:

color palette systems, layout patterns, typography pairings, component libraries, Astro + React theme starter kits (your stack), brand kits + site templates together (Designers pay more for coherent systems than single templates.)

How it works
3/11/26- include packages HERE! The Growing Pup → beginner stage The Rising Carnivore → established and growing The Alpha → leader / dominant business

interview

I host it for them. Clients do not know what to do with the files or how to even edit them. I set it up on my one account for them and charge them monthly. They prefer that. Get some recurring revenue

design

I have two packages: 1) I have lump sum $3500 minimum for 5 pages and $25 a month hosting and general maintenance, 2) $0 down $150 a month, unlimited edits, 24/7 support, hosting, etc.

develop

I host it for them. Clients do not know what to do with the files or how to even edit them. I set it up on my one account for them and charge them monthly. They prefer that. Get some recurring revenue

launch

I have two packages: 1) I have lump sum $3500 minimum for 5 pages and $25 a month hosting and general maintenance, 2) $0 down $150 a month, unlimited edits, 24/7 support, hosting, etc.
